title: munnozia liaboides
intro: Munnozia liaboides, also known as the "Mountain Munnozia," is a plant species native to the Andean region, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Munnozia liaboides has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Munnozia liaboides can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
